ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the benchmark (e.g., compiler, image processing) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the benchmark (e.g., compiler: performance, image processing: quality) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., throughput, latency) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "mode_type" TEXT /* Type of mode (e.g., throughput, latency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread configuration */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of threads */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thread configuration */,
  "thread_affinity" TEXT /* Thread affinity (e.g., CPU, GPU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample configuration */,
  "sample_count" INTEGER /* Number of samples */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample configuration */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of each sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mode */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread configuration */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample configuration */,
  "score" REAL /* Performance score */,
  "score_error" REAL /* Score error */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the score */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, performance engineer, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jvm_versions" (
  "jvm_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JVM version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the JVM */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the JVM version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the JVM version */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the JVM */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the JVM (e.g., x86, ARM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jvm_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark run */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mode */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread configuration */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample configuration */,
  "jvm_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JVM version used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the benchmark */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was run */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time when the benchmark was run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_jvm_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("jvm_version_id") REFERENCES jvm_versions ("jvm_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark run */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance score */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* User or group with whom the result is shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_shares_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark run */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generate_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_reports_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)
